mutuality.preferred: Mutual NDA preferred; avoid one-sided obligations.

definition_of_confidential_information.preferred: Broad but clear definition with practical marking/confirmation rules.

exceptions.preferred: Keep standard carve-outs: public, prior knowledge, independent development, third-party lawful receipt, legal compulsion.

term_and_survival.preferred: Finite confidentiality survival (commonly 2–5 years) unless trade-secret carve-out.

use_restrictions.preferred: Use limited to evaluating/performing the business relationship.

return_or_destroy.preferred: Return/destroy on request with limited backup/legal retention carve-out.

residuals.preferred: Avoid broad residuals clauses; if present, tightly limit scope.

non_solicit_non_compete.preferred: NDA should avoid hidden non-compete/non-solicit obligations unless explicitly negotiated.

governing_law_jurisdiction.preferred: Prefer neutral/favorable jurisdiction; avoid hard-to-enforce foreign venues where possible.

liability_and_remedies.preferred: Allow injunctive relief but avoid unlimited liability expansion hidden in NDA.

assignment_and_affiliates.preferred: Assignment by consent, with affiliate sharing allowed under same obligations when needed.
red_flags: free assignment to unknown third parties
